Cursed Coin

Triggers: Once in a while

3 random enemies gain a mark for 2 sec. Marked enemies can’t receive shields, healing, or damage reduction effects. If an enemy dies while the mark is active, magic projectiles fly out of that unit to 2 nearby enemies. Each projectile deals 80000 magic damage.

Requirements: 90-100
